conservative.name: Malicious Seduction
conservative.requirements: Target must be within medium range and able to see you clearly

success.description: Your allure draws in the target and he forgets about the other threats around him

chaosStar.description: Your allure draws out the raw mania of your target. He gains the Invigorated condition while this card is recharging

challenge.description: Effect: While this card recharges, your target removes from the dice pool when targeting you with an attack, and all of your allies remove from the dice pool when targeting him with an attack

reckless.name: Malicious Seduction
reckless.requirements: Target must be within medium range and able to see you clearly

success.description: Your allure draws in the target and he forgets about the other threats around him

sigmarsComet.description: Your target may not recover stress or fatigue while this card is recharging

challenge.description: Effect: While this card recharges, your target removes from the dice pool when targeting you with an attack, and all of your allies remove from the dice pool when targeting him with an attack
